DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF JESSIE STREET COLLECTIVE, LLC'S MOTION TO COMPEL DISCOVERY RESPONSES, ATTENDANCE AND TESTIMONY OF DEFENDANTS AT DEPOSITION, AND FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS. COUNSEL STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. DISCUSSED AND THE MOTION IS CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 27, 2018. COUNSEL ARE DIRECTED TO CONTINUE TO MEET AND CONFER WITHIN 10 DAYS OF RECEIVING A DECISION ON THE DEMURRER THAT IS PRESENTLY UNDER SUBMISSION. FURTHER, COUNSEL ARE TO PROVIDE A COPY OF THE DECISION ON THE DEMURRER TO THE JUDGE PRO TEM. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO COMPEL, PRESENTLY SCHEDULED FOR FEBRUARY 6, 2018, IS ALSO CONTINUED TO FEBRUARY 27, 2018 TO BE HEARD WITH THIS MOTION, AS INTENDED IN THE COURT'S JANUARY 8, 2018 ORDER. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

Counsel stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. Discussed and the motion is continued to February 27, 2018. Further, counsel are to provide a copy of the decision on the demurrer to the Judge Pro Tem.
